# kIOUSBEndpointDirectionIn

**Enumeration Case**

Data flows from the device into the driver.

## Declaration

```swift
kIOUSBEndpointDirectionIn
```

## Getting the Endpoint Direction

- **kIOUSBEndpointDirectionOut**: Data flows from the driver out to the device.
- **kIOUSBEndpointDirectionUnknown**: The transfer direction is unknown.

items.description: Data flows from the driver out to the device.
